title: Design System: Ohene Adjei Effah — Portfolio

display.purpose: Hero and page H1s in Space Grotesk; one gold accent word permitted.

label.purpose: IBM Plex Mono for every fact, prompt, tag, date — the terminal signal.

shadows.name: premium-lift
shadows.purpose: Wide, low-opacity ambient lift applied on hover/focus of cards and the primary CTA. Never a resting state.

motion.name: premium-ease
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo curve (~0.4s) for hover lifts and state transitions. Crisp, no bounce.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal fade-up via IntersectionObserver; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary CTA per page ('Start a project'). Gold pill, tactile lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--color-gold, #d9a441); color: var(--color-ink, #0d1420); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-golddeep, #b4832e); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -15px rgba(13,20,32,0.05), 0 0 10px rgba(13,20,32,0.02); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-gold, #d9a441); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (on dark)
components.description: Secondary action on dark hero surfaces ('See the work').
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #eef1ef; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

components.name: Case-Study Card
components.description: Work/blog card: flat + bordered at rest, soft lift on hover. Mono eyebrow, title, tagline.
components.html:
Laravel

InkBulkSMS

Contact management and bulk SMS dispatch with a real-time tracking dashboard.
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,20,32,0.1); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -15px rgba(13,20,32,0.05), 0 0 10px rgba(13,20,32,0.02); } .ds-card-cover { height: 128px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(217,164,65,0.25), rgba(47,111,78,0.15)); } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #b4832e; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #0d1420; margin: 8px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #475569; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact-form field with a mono uppercase label and a gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ds-input { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,20,32,0.15); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; color: #0d1420; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #d9a441; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #d9a441; }

components.name: Section Eyebrow (terminal prompt)
components.description: The signature mono file-path kicker that leads every section — the sanctioned eyebrow.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #b4832e; margin: 0 0 12px; }

components.name: Tech Tag Chip
components.description: Static stack tag on case studies. Mono, deep-linen fill, no interactive state.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; background: #e3e7e2; color: #0d1420; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 8px; }

components.name: Terminal Mock (signature)
components.description: The hero centerpiece — a fake shell session that demonstrates the pitch instead of claiming it.
components.html:
ohene@dev — zsh
$ whoami --for-clients
> Full-stack developer, 7+ years in production
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: #161f2e; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-terminal-title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 24px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 2; color: #e2e8f0; }

narrative.overview: This is the bench of someone who builds production software and stands behind it. Every surface reads like a well-kept workspace: honest materials, tools left where a maker can reach them, nothing decorative that doesn't earn its place. The terminal prompt eyebrows, circuit-trace dividers, and monospaced statistics are the tools of the trade made visible. Warmth comes from the linen paper ground and the gold-forest-rust weave (a Kente nod), not from softness or gloss. The system is confident through restraint — it states facts in a plain, well-set voice and lets whitespace and typography carry the authority. Depth is mostly flat; motion and shadow are held back until an element is touched, at which point it lifts with a crisp, tactile confidence.
keyCharacteristics: Warm linen paper ground with deep terminal-ink for hero/CTA anchors
A three-thread accent weave: Signal Gold (action), Circuit Forest (links), Ember Rust (punctuation)
Space Grotesk display + IBM Plex Sans body + IBM Plex Mono for every label, prompt, and stat
Flat, bordered surfaces at rest; a single soft shadow-lift on interaction
Signature motifs: terminal file-path eyebrows and the Kente/circuit-trace divider

rules.name: The One-Thread Rule
rules.body: Signal Gold is the only color that means 'act.' It never decorates — if gold appears, it's a CTA, a live prompt, or the one word carrying the claim.

rules.name: The Weave Rule
rules.body: Gold, forest, and rust are a set, not a rainbow. They rotate in that order to echo a woven pattern; a fourth accent hue is prohibited.

rules.name: The Prompt Rule
rules.body: Every section eyebrow is a mono file-path prompt (› ~/section). It is the only sanctioned eyebrow form — a deliberate system, not the generic all-caps kicker.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Anything that is a fact — a number, date, stack tag, URL, read-time — is set in IBM Plex Mono. Prose is never mono; data is never prose-set.

rules.name: The Workbench Rule
rules.body: Surfaces lie flat and bordered at rest. The premium shadow and any lift appear only on hover/focus. The aurora and glass are reserved for at most one dark-hero moment per page — never the default card material.

dos: Do ground pages in Warm Linen (#eef1ef) and anchor hero/CTA/footer in Terminal Ink (#0d1420).
Do keep Signal Gold to the one-thread role — CTAs, one accent word, live prompts.
Do set every fact (numbers, dates, tags, URLs) in IBM Plex Mono; keep prose in Plex Sans.
Do lead sections with the mono terminal prompt eyebrow (› ~/section).
Do keep surfaces flat and bordered at rest; reserve the premium shadow for hover/focus.
Do rotate accents gold → forest → rust to echo the weave.
Do hold body text at slate-700 on linen for ≥4.5:1 contrast; don't drop to light gray.
donts: Don't ship the generic template portfolio look — interchangeable ThemeForest card grids.
Don't drift into the corporate/agency stock aesthetic — stock-photo teams, buzzword soup, faceless polish.
Don't assemble cliché SaaS-landing scaffolding: gradient hero + identical feature-card wall + a big-number metric row as the whole argument.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or a fourth accent hue — both break the weave.
Don't let glass (backdrop-blur) or the animated aurora become default card material.
Don't put facts in prose type or prose in mono — the Mono-for-Data line is fixed.
Don't add resting drop-shadows to flat content; borders and tone convey separation.
